docs.title: ElysiaJS Official Documentation
docs.description: Ergonomic TypeScript framework for humans. Bun-optimized with end-to-end type safety, OpenAPI generation from TypeScript, and plugin support. Also runs on Node.js.

docs.title: Elysia Quick Start
docs.description: Get started with Elysia: installation, routing, handlers, and lifecycle events.

docs.title: Elysia Lifecycle Hooks
docs.description: Event-based middleware system: onRequest, beforeHandle, afterHandle, and onResponse hooks.

docs.title: Elysia Plugins
docs.description: Plugin ecosystem overview including auth, CORS, Swagger, and GraphQL plugins.

docs.title: Elysia Eden RPC Client
docs.description: Type-safe RPC client that generates client-side types directly from server route definitions.
